articles.author: Martin Goillandeau, Elizabeth Wolfe, Taylor Romine, Chris Boyette
articles.title: Husband’s arrest in disappearance of American woman in the Bahamas puts his account under scrutiny - CNN
articles.description: The arrest of an American man who told authorities his wife fell overboard while on a dinghy in rough waters in the Bahamas has brought greater scrutiny to his account of what happened as the search for her enters a fifth day.
